title: TODO: short title
description: The application directory at /opt/winlab/disk-full-recovery is consuming over 64 MB: a 48 MB cache blob and a 16 MB bloated error log. The recovery procedure requires freeing space below 8 MB total and writing a recovery.report to confirm the action was intentional.
hint_1: run du -sh /opt/winlab/disk-full-recovery/* to find what's large
